assessment_meta.notes: Real manual screen using listing evidence plus limited public planning-context checks. Conservative placeholders retained where authoritative site-report fields were not fully verified in-session.

site.access_notes: Corner block per listing description. Frontage appears favourable at screen level but exact frontage dimensions not yet verified from authoritative mapping or survey.

residential_subdivision_use_case.notes: Target use case matches MVP scope. Listing explicitly markets redevelopment potential for duplex/townhouse outcome (STCA), which supports subdivision-style screening relevance.

current_zone.notes: Listing states medium density zoning, but authoritative council zoning map/site report was not fully verified in-session. Treat as indicative only pending official planning source confirmation.

local_plan_precinct.plan_name: Nambour local plan area likely relevant
local_plan_precinct.notes: Nambour local plan area is likely relevant based on suburb context, but exact precinct/site-specific local plan mapping was not verified in this pass.

minimum_lot_size.notes: Minimum lot size or equivalent subdivision threshold not yet verified from authoritative planning scheme controls for this site.

effective_yield.notes: Screen-level only. Gross area is modest at 598sqm; until zoning, frontage, servicing, and minimum lot size controls are confirmed, no reliable indicative lot count should be asserted.

frontage_access.notes: Corner block is a positive signal for frontage/access flexibility, but exact frontage, crossover, and servicing constraints remain unverified.

flood.notes: Flood status not verified from council flood mapping in this pass.

steep_land_landslide.notes: Steep land / landslide overlays not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass.

biodiversity_waterways.notes: Biodiversity / waterway constraints not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass.

prior_application_history.notes: Prior application history not yet checked in Development.i / PD Online equivalent during this pass.

critical_unknowns: Minimum lot size / subdivision threshold not verified
Steep land / landslide status not checked
next_actions: Obtain authoritative site report or council mapping output for zoning and local plan / precinct
Verify minimum lot size and any frontage requirements from the applicable planning controls
Check flood, steep land / landslide, and biodiversity / waterways overlays
Check prior development application history for the site
Confirm frontage and access dimensions from mapping or survey information
